featured.title: I Quit Corporate Tech at 33: The Beautiful Reality of My First Year in FIRE
featured.subtitle: An unfiltered reflection on the first 365 days outside the corporate matrix.
featured.description: What does the first year of FIRE actually look like? Reflections on escaping the corporate tech bubble, building health, and finding purpose after retiring early at 33.

featured.title: The Brutal Truth About Passive Income: Why The Internet Is Lying To You
featured.subtitle: Passive income is real, but the way it is sold to you is a catastrophic misrepresentation of the suffering required to achieve it.
featured.description: An honest, hyper-personal breakdown of the four types of income, the nomadic journey, and why trying to separate your time from your money is the hardest active grind you will ever face.

featured.title: Do Not Pursue FIRE If You Cannot Pass This Brutal Test
featured.subtitle: A harsh, psychological reality check on whether you actually want early retirement, or if you just hate your job and love spending money.
featured.description: FIRE is not for everyone. Find out if your relationship with money, possessions, and purpose will make early retirement a dream or a living nightmare.

featured.title: The 3 Things That Took Me from $40k in Debt to Coast FIRE at 33
featured.subtitle: Yes a 9-5 helped me reach Coast FIRE in a decade
featured.description: How a 9-5 job, strategic saving, and consistent investing helped me reach Coast FIRE in a decade

featured.title: What is Coast F.I.R.E?
featured.subtitle: The Complete Coast FIRE Blueprint: How to Stop worrying about retirement and live for today
featured.description: A detailed breakdown of the math behind Coast FIRE

featured.subtitle: The Complete Barista FIRE Blueprint: How to Retire Partially
featured.description: A detailed breakdown of the math behind Barista FIRE

featured.title: The Brutal Reality of Lean FIRE: Retiring on $30k Without Going Crazy
featured.subtitle: The Complete Lean FIRE Blueprint: How to Retire Early on a Modest Income
featured.description: Can you survive early retirement on $30k/year? Uncover the strict math, the 3.25% rule, and the ruthless sacrifices needed for a successful Lean FIRE in the US & UK.

featured.title: How much do you need to retire at 40?
featured.subtitle: A detailed breakdown of the math behind early retirement
featured.description: A detailed breakdown of the math behind early retirement

featured.title: LeanFIRE vs FatFIRE vs BaristaFIRE vs CoastFIRE: The Ultimate Guide to Financial Independence
featured.subtitle: And which is the right one for you?
featured.description: A detailed breaddown of different flavors of FIRE

featured.title: The Complete Guide to Calculating Your FIRE Number
featured.subtitle: A practical walkthrough of the 4% rule and personalization
featured.description: Learn how to use the 4% rule to determine precisely how much you need to retire. Complete with examples of target portfolios and Lean FIRE annual expenses.

recent.title: This one call helped me retire 4 years faster
recent.subtitle: 4 things I did which helped me make money quicker and fast track my way into an early retirement at just 33.
recent.description: How I processed the fact that I'd just negotiated $200K more than what they initially offered me at Meta. Here are 4 things I did which helped me make money quicker and fast track my way into an early retirement.

recent.title: The Brutal Psychology of Why You Won't Negotiate Your Next Job Offer
recent.subtitle: And how this psychological trap could cost you $500,000+ over your career
recent.description: A breakdown of the cognitive biases—loss aversion, risk aversion, and the authority trap—that cause 55% of workers to accept the first number on the table.

recent.title: From $6,000/Month in NYC to $1,100 Abroad: My Geo-Arbitrage Experiment
recent.subtitle: How I cut my expenses by 82% without sacrificing quality of life
recent.description: A detailed breakdown of how I went from spending $6,000/month in New York City to living comfortably on $1,100/month through geographic arbitrage.

recent.title: Here's how you can save upto $500 each month
recent.subtitle: And retire years earlier than you thought you could
recent.description: Psychological tips and tricks that can help you save more money than you can think of
